extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG Jakob attacked solo from early breakaway and held off chasing YATES Adam, who distanced ROGLIČ Primož by 16 seconds in final kilometers.
tactical_patterns: FUGLSANG Jakob attacked from early breakaway, not from GC group, maintaining 38-53 second gap through technical descent showing pre-race breakaway positioning key.
YATES Adam attacked ROGLIČ Primož late when closing gap to FUGLSANG proved impossible, forcing ROGLIČ to let wheel slip rather than chase.
Astana deployed multiple riders into early breakaway providing FUGLSANG Jakob launch platform, repeating successful tactic from previous stage showing team pattern.

rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: attacked from breakaway on steep circuit climbs, held 38-53 seconds through technical descent showing exceptional solo time trialing strength
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: timed late attack perfectly when ROGLIČ committed to chasing FUGLSANG, gained 16 seconds plus bonuses totaling 25 second GC advantage
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: let YATES wheel slip on final climb unable to respond, lost 16 seconds revealing vulnerability when forced to chase distant breakaway
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: neutral: made early breakaway with GABBURO Davide before FUGLSANG attack, showing willingness to commit resources early in hilly stages
